frame.note: C1 teaching frame — where the registered grid reached 0.80 (D-065)

held.midNeutralSource: D-024(b) — the desirability neutral the C3/C4 rounds use; held fixed so D-065's C3/C4 cells are unperturbed

constraints.bornDominanceFilter: D-069 (re-measured): a cell's favored good is BORN-DOMINANT iff its A(g) is sustained >= 0.85 (1 - DOM_RISE_MIN) across the first 12 rounds (WINDOW_ROUNDS) from its first stably-defined value (n>=2 events); else EMERGED. Replaces the confounded first-defined A(g)=1.0 rise filter (D-066 c2). Harness-side; NOT the engine DOMINANT(g).

note: Pinned grid (D-066, operator-approved). Recorded pre-run (H6). Swept EXACTLY as listed. The result is re-classified under the D-069 born-dominance measure — the deterministic runs (config+seed) are byte-identical to the committed run; only the harness-side classifier changed (no re-run, no engine change, no re-pin).
